title: zieria veronicea subsp. veronicea
intro: Zieria veronicea subsp. veronicea, also known as the Sunshine Pepperbush, is a flowering plant in the Rutaceae family, native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Zieria veronicea subsp. veronicea is often used to make teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
